case_title: TRUST, RUSSEL FLYNN B. vs. DUNMORE, REGINA AKA DUNMORE, REGINA LYNN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRUST, RUSSEL FLYNN B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNMORE, REGINA AKA DUNMORE, REGINA LYNN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 555 JONES, #204 S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRUST, RUSSEL FLYNN B. AS TO DEFENDANT DUNMORE, REGINA AKA DUNMORE, REGINA LYNN SUMMONS ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DUNMORE, REGINA AKA DUNMORE, REGINA LYNN
